site.name: THEHELIGROUP
site.tagline: Independent helicopter maintenance and training. Norwich, UK.

home.seoDescription: UK CAA Part 145 helicopter maintenance and UK CAA / EASA Part 147 type training. Independent of any operator, rapid mobilisation, worldwide support from Norwich, UK.

hero.kicker: UK CAA · EASA approved — Norwich, UK
hero.heading: Independent helicopter maintenance & training.
hero.sub: Part 145 engineering and Part 147 type training under one roof. Independent of any operator, mobilised worldwide.
hero.imageAlt: Twin-engine helicopters in formation against an overcast sky

about.heading: The only stand-alone Part 145 and Part 147 organisation in the UK.
about.imageAlt: A HELI145 engineer working on a helicopter airframe
body: THEHELIGROUP started in 2017 as a consultancy and grew into something the UK didn't otherwise have: combined helicopter maintenance and type training, under one roof, independent of any operator, AOC, or corporate parent.

That independence is the whole point. No fleet of our own pulls engineers off your aircraft on a bad day. We mobilise quickly, stay competitive, and answer to you. The team are engineers, supervisors, mentors, instructors and assessors with decades on the airframe.

why.heading: Three things that don't happen elsewhere.

items.title: Independent of any operator
items.body: No AOC commitments pulling our engineers off your aircraft when another fleet has a bad day.

items.title: Rapid mobilisation
items.body: A small, senior team and no committee. AOG calls go straight to a duty engineer, day or night.

items.title: Both sides, one roof
items.body: The only combined Part 145 and Part 147 set-up in the UK. Maintenance and training that actually talk to each other.

quote.text: Bobby and his team are precise, reliable and, very importantly, knowledgeable about what they do. Highly recommended for technical support on AW139 and AW169.

services.seoTitle: Services — HELI145 maintenance & technical support | THEHELIGROUP
services.seoDescription: UK CAA Part 145 helicopter maintenance, pre-purchase inspections, continued airworthiness, HELICapture documentation and technical support.

hero.heading: Maintenance and support, end to end.
hero.sub: UK CAA Part 145 engineering plus the surrounding services that keep a helicopter legal, safe, and flying.

maintenance.title: HELI145
maintenance.imageAlt: Base maintenance work on a helicopter at the Norwich hangar
maintenance.body: UK CAA Part 145 maintenance and technical support, line and base. On schedule, on standard, with senior engineers who own the job end to end.

related.title: Pre-Purchase Inspections
related.body: Independent PPI assessments so buyers know exactly what they're acquiring, before they sign.

related.title: HELICapture
related.body: Technical capture and documentation that gives your airworthiness records the rigour they deserve.

related.title: Continued Airworthiness
related.body: Ongoing airworthiness management support, keeping your fleet legal, safe, and ready to fly.

related.title: Technical Support
related.body: Engineering advice, troubleshooting and fleet support, drawn from decades on the frontline.

training.seoTitle: Training — HELI147 Part 147 type training | THEHELIGROUP
training.seoDescription: UK CAA and EASA Part 147 helicopter maintenance type training, theory and practical, delivered by working instructors and assessors.

hero.heading: Part 147 type training, taught by people who still turn spanners.
hero.sub: UK CAA and EASA approved type training, theory and practical. Private cohorts available.

pillar.title: HELI147
pillar.imageAlt: A Part 147 type-training session in progress
pillar.body: UK CAA and EASA Part 147 type training delivered by instructors and assessors with decades on the airframe. Courses run at Norwich, at an OEM facility, or on-site at your hangar.

points.title: Approved types
points.body: Type training across the Leonardo AW and Airbus H ranges on the schedule. Ask about your specific type.

points.title: UK CAA & EASA
points.body: Courses approved under both UK CAA and EASA Part 147, so your qualification travels.

points.title: Private cohorts
points.body: Single engineer or a full team. Private cohorts available for operators training a group.

points.title: Flexible delivery
points.body: Norwich classroom, OEM facility, or on-site at your hangar. We work around your operation.

fleet.seoDescription: Leonardo and Airbus rotorcraft supported for maintenance and type training. AW109, AW119, AW139, AW169, AW189, H125, H145, BK117.

hero.heading: The fleet we know inside out.
hero.sub: Leonardo and Airbus rotorcraft on the schedule for maintenance and type training. If your type isn't here, ask. We'll be straight with you.

types.note: Flagship medium twin. Heavy maintenance and B1.3 training.
Light intermediate. Full Part 145 and type training.

contact.seoDescription: Talk to THEHELIGROUP about Part 145 maintenance or Part 147 training. Based at Norwich International Airport, serving operators worldwide.

hero.heading: Tell us what you need. We'll come back the same day.
hero.sub: The fastest way in is the chat, bottom right. It asks the questions our team would ask and gets you in front of the right engineer.

qa.q: What aircraft types do you support?
qa.a: On the schedule we cover Leonardo AW109, AW119, AW139, AW169 and AW189, plus Airbus H125, H145 and BK117 C2/D2/D3. If your type isn't listed, ask and we'll be straight about whether we can help.

qa.q: What is the difference between HELI145 and HELI147?
qa.a: HELI145 is our UK CAA Part 145 maintenance and technical-support arm. HELI147 is our UK CAA and EASA Part 147 type-training arm. Same team, one roof.
Business Aviation Centre, Norwich International Airport, Norwich NR6 6JT, UK. We mobilise to operators worldwide.
No, quotes are issued per job after a quick enquiry so they're accurate and competitive. Tell us what you need and the team will come back with a figure.

qa.q: My aircraft is grounded (AOG). What do I do?
qa.a: That's the fast lane. Tell me the type, registration, location and the snag, and I'll route it to the duty engineer straight away.

qa.q: How do I book a Part 147 course?
qa.a: Tell me the type, whether you need UK CAA, EASA or both, and rough timing, and I'll get the HELI147 team to line it up. Private cohorts are available.
